control_card.C: The artifact is one stdlib Python emitter that writes rows JSON, rows CSV, summary JSON, Markdown, and a manifest through an atomic directory replacement.
control_card.F: Missing: rigorous localized identity closure with cutoff terms, compatible annular/boundary constants, nonlocal velocity closure, scaling-coupled width ODE, finite symmetric Hou-Luo BKM, and Clay NS.
control_card.G: Validation passes only when all eleven rows exist, all requested proof and promotion flags are false, and the Clay guard blocks promotion.
control_card.L: Rows are fixed by required IDs, hash-stamped with sorted JSON, and validated against exact fail-closed flags.
control_card.P: Use this as Sprint 151 accounting for missing localized enstrophy inputs; do not cite it as an Agda theorem, analytic closure, BKM finiteness proof, or Clay solution.
control_card.R: Emit a deterministic localized-enstrophy identity ledger with rows for definition, omega1 input, cutoff, flux, diffusion, leakage, stretching, Biot-Savart closure, constants, width-ODE extraction, and Clay guard.
control_card.S: The formal identity shape is ledgered, but cutoff leakage, nonlocal Biot-Savart control, simultaneous constants, and width-ODE validity remain open.
